creator: walterhurry@gmail.com
text:
Notification Daemon dumps core as soon as a message is sent

How-To-Repeat: Start /usr/local/libexec/notification-daemon in foreground in one terminal window.

In another, type 'notify-send hello world'

The first window shows this:

Fontconfig warning: "/usr/local/etc/fonts/conf.d/50-user.conf", line 14: reading configurations from ~/.fonts.conf is deprecated.
Assertion failed: (! _cairo_surface_has_mime_data (surface)), function cairo_surface_mark_dirty_rectangle, file cairo-surface.c, line 1174.
Abort trap: 6 (core dumped)
$
